headline: Airbnb Airport Pickups Signal Shift Toward Full Trip Service Platform
summary: Airbnb (NasdaqGS:ABNB) has introduced private airport pickup services in 125 cities through a new partnership. The rollout expands Airbnb's offering beyond lodging into coordinated ground transportation at the start of a trip. The service integrates with existing Airbnb bookings, aiming to streamline the arrival experience for guests. For a company built around short term stays and experiences, Airbnb's move into airport pickups marks a clear attempt to cover more of the trip. Travel...
